text:
The Sword of Truth (, Shinjitsu no Tsurugi) is an item that can be found in Greed Island. It is Gon and Killua's first specified slot card, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 132 although they aren't able to keep possession of it for long. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 133 

Appearance

Its appearance is that of a sword with an inscription inscribed on the bottom-middle of the blade and a cross inscribed at the end of its end. 

Overview

The Sword of Truth is an item that can be obtained by winning the monthly Rock-Paper-Scissors competition that takes place in the city of Antokiba. It can also transform into a designated card required to beat the game. 

Plot

Greed Island arc

Gon and Killua participate in the Rock-Paper-Scissors competition in Antokiba. Killua wins and as a reward, he receives the sword, which immediately transforms into a card. The sword, however, is stolen after by one of a bunch of skilled veteran players. 

Card

The "Sword of Truth" card has a specified number of 83. Its rank is B and its card limit is 22. 

Trivia

Killua and Gon both reach the finals of the competition to win the item. 
Gon revealed to Killua a few tricks Hunter × Hunter - Volume 14, Chapter 131 that help him win at Rock-Paper-Scissors. Killua turns things around by switching hands and wins. 
This is the first card Killua and Gon obtained.
